title: [MTR3/4] British Rail Class 165
description: MTR resource pack that adds the British Rail Class 165 into Minecraft
body:
# About
The British Rail Class 165 Networker Turbo is a fleet of suburban diesel-hydraulic multiple unit passenger trains (DMUs), originally specified by and built for the British Rail Thames and Chiltern Division of Network SouthEast. They were built by BREL York Works between 1990 and 1992.
# Function
This resource pack adds the Class 165 in Blank, GWR and Chiltern Railways livery

**Note**: Some of the gangways will not load due to mod limitations
# Credits
Credits to LX9702 for the Class 157 model, which the Class 165 is based on.
